scene_title: Rosto de robo conversando com boca aberta
narrative_beat: Olhos dourados e luz carmesim em hospital P&B

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid humanoid robot face in close view with slightly open mechanical mouth and golden camera eyes emitting crimson light in conversation pose with visible metallic textures and joints in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the slightly open mechanical mouth and golden camera eyes emitting crimson light
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated hospital triage room with empty gurneys in background
props: robot face with open mechanical mouth

composition.foreground: robot face in vivid gold crimson

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, crimson metallic highlights

symbolism.primary: the image that speaks — Revelation 13:15 in clinical reality
symbolism.secondary: camera eyes as surveillance-empathy — watching while pretending to care

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only
